Cut veg, reserving seperately.
Toss each veg with oil to coat and salt to lightly season
Fill sheet trays with each individual vegetable in a single layer with room between pieces.
In a preheated convection oven set to ~400°F high fan, roast each tray for ~10 minutes rotating half way
Check for doneness using a fork or cake tester - should be tender throughout, but not soft (al dente)
Reserve in blast chiller until cool.
Toss together once cooled, reserve in hotel pans and store in cooler.
